feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Commentary time
entry.content:
Hello All

We have used commentary solution in a SAC table where users use the time filter to change month & provide comment for the selected month.

 

I have now a requriement to show the latest commented date for every month.

 

Any thoughts/ideas on the solution.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud #Comment #SAC

entry.title: Dimension Hierarchy Dropdown total
entry.content: I have a dimension ( Called "Fonte de financiamento", whitch has 3 "children" "RP", "RG", and "OE", than it has the other children of this 3 things) in a row on DropDown level 1 showing all totals ( I selected on Show/Hide of the dimesion ), but when i select level 2 dropdown, the totals dissapears. When i use drop down on one of those 3, it continues to appear, but when i select 2, the totals do the same and dissapear. What is the problem, and how can i fix it?

entry.title: How to transport a Data Model conversion to New Model Type
entry.content:
Dear SAP Analytics Cloud community,

Currently we are looking into the conversion of Classic Account Models to the New Model Type and are curious to read over some experiences and see whether there are any solutions for our challenges.

We have been using SAP Analytics Cloud from the very beginning and Data Models were initially created as the Classic Account Model. With regard to the future and the desire to use new capabilities of the New Model Type we would like to convert our models. Our landscape consists out of separate development, acceptance and production systems. Ideally, we would like to prepare the conversion in our development system as a change and transport it throughout the landscape.

Is there any documentation on best practices for the conversion of Data Models?

Using our transport system would mean that we lose production data in the migrated model after importing the change. Performing the conversion in the production system would mean more risks and downtime of reports and other background processes such as loading and transforming data with Multi/Data Actions.

We are curious about your experience.

entry.title: Datasphere & SAC - Decimal places in Export
entry.content:
Hello,

when i export a table to excel it gives me for some calculation many decimal places even though i set it to 2 decimal places.

For example

Data coming from  Datasphere via live data connection.

Is there any possibility to format this to 2 decimal palces?

 

Kr

entry.title: How to generate a value for a specific selection of a cell in a table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can some one help me to find a way to filter the dimensions by selecting a cell in the table, considering the below example we have two models. Model 1 and Model 2 , there are two tables in a story on selection of model 1 table  we should fetch that specific combination and a pop up should appear for the selection of scenario dimension which is specifically present in model 2 ,After selecting the scenario , value 1 should generate for the selections.

       
MODEL 1    Amount 
 AccountCost CenterProfit CenterProduct  
 KPI1CC1PC1P1  
 KPI2CC2PC2P2  
       
       
       
       
MODEL 2     Amount
 Accountcost centerprofit centerproductScenario 
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S11
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S21

entry.title: Move data only to first product in the hierarchy below using data action in SAC
entry.content:
I have a Product dimension which has 2 hierarchies, PL6 and PL7. The hierarchy is something like this. I want to move the data from hierarchy PL6 level to PL7 but only to the first product in PL7 hierarchy. I'm trying to do it with the below code using FOREACH. It is moving the data to all the products in the PL7. [p/SKUPL6] is the attribute which has the connection between PL7 AND PL6 hierarchies. Each product at PL7 level has this attribute SKUPL6 which has the value for PL6 under which it belongs to. I'm trying to use FOREACH to move data from PL6 for each iteration to PL7 and then delete the product if SKUPL6 = null.. As SKUPL6 only has values for PL7 products and for PL6 products this attribute is blank. The below code is copying data for all products below PL6 but not deleting PL6 value within the FOREACH. I'm trying to delete the PL6 value so it only copies the value for the first product and for the next product it will have no value in PL6 to copy below.

How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Data Locks into a model started failing with locking issue
entry.content:
Hello All - Data loads that were scheduled from Model --> Data Management view into one of the models has started failing from past one week with a locking issue (Version: Actuals). They were fine before and last week we modified import job of one of the steps. Hence modified the schedule to incorporate it. Before last week also ACTUAL version is locked. Can you give me some pointers to understand why it started failing after we modified the schedule?

I have an alternate to schedule the loads from calendar with a multi action. But any help to understand the reason behind this failure would be helpful.

Also please suggest on best ways to schedule data loads into models from source system.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: SAC Planning BPC live model - Publish data from the script issue
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I'm working in an SAC Planning environment connected to a live BPC embedded model from BW. I use buttons with scripts to run several planning sequences together with data saves (publish data) in the same step, and it works fine when I'm working with the model and a table in input mode. However, I've noticed that it doesn't recognize that the version's data has been modified for a story where I run a planning sequence and a data save, where the table is not input-ready. It seems like there's a delay between the end of the sequence and the data published. As a workaround, I've added a refresh step between the sequence execution and the publish step, and it works that way. Has anyone else experienced this? Any other solutions?

This is the code:

BPC_PlanningSequence.execute();

//This refresh is introduced with the purpose of ensuring that it recognizes 
Table_1.getDataSource().refreshData();

var bpcVersion = Table_1.getPlanning().getPublicVersion("All Versions");
if (bpcVersion) {
if(bpcVersion.isDirty()) {
bpcVersion.publish();
};
};

Best Regards,

Rubén

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Transactional Data Upload
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

Need help with a query regarding transactional data upload in SAC. So I have uploaded the data into my model where the account dimension along with a number of other dimensions are mapped to unassigned. Now the problem is that the import is successful, data is uploaded and I can see it in the data foundation view but not in the stories and data analyzer. If I select all the same filters, even then I can't see the data. 

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: is there any way to push comments from SAC to datasphere table?
entry.content: I'm trying to store all comments that are entered by users in sac analytic application or stories from SAC to sap datasphere table, if there is any option to do that suggest me!

entry.title: when we open the SAC add-in file in SAC it should automatically sign in?
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone help me here, SSO is enabled and when i am trying to open the SAC add-in file it ask me sign in again?

entry.title: SAC Add-in file in SAC Environment, transport Dev to quality it should automatically change the URL?
entry.content: Add-in file is saved in SAC and when i am trying to transport it from Dev environment to Quality URL doesn't change?

entry.title: Export table from SAC to Excel - how to keep cells background color
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have this table in SAC with threshold set up like on the right side on screenshot.

After exporting in Excel, I've got following table:

Is there any way to keep cells background color in Excel and not numbers (1,2,3)?

Thanks in advance!

Kristina

entry.title: User cannot schedule publications from Files tab in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

A user is not able to access the 'Schedule publication' option in the Files page from the share icon (please see the image below). The particular user can only access this feature within the story from the File menu using File > Schedule Publication.

Please let me know what permissions this user needs to be able to schedule publications from the share icon in the Files tab of SAP Analytics Cloud.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Always login HANA via Live Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
My company currently using SAC connect to SAP HANA database (on-premise, not HANA cloud). I want to provide about 50 SAC account for 50 Sale Employee in order to view their sales report. The problem is I use a Live Connection, so I must do Data Authorization in HANA. So for each SAC account there is a corresponding HANA account to authorize. I've tried 2 Direct Live Connection: Username Password and SSO. But both of them need to login HANA again every time I restart my laptop or shut down and power on again (for Username Password there is a Set Credential pop-up when access to the story, and for SSO I need to go <host>:<port> to login the HANA account again. But I don't want to provide my sale employees HANA account, It's very sensitive. I just want to go to their device and login HANA once. The questions are: 
1. Is there another solution for my case beside Username Password and SSO?
2. Is there any way to keep the login of Username Password to HANA in SAC, or keep always login in <host>:<port> for SSO after every time I restart the devices?
Thank you !

entry.title: I am unable to use excel file for model creation on SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: hello there i am unable to use excel/csv file to create model as it option to use excel/csv file is not showing in my modeler. Can someone help me with the situation?

entry.title: General data type in xlsx file from SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard
entry.content:
Hello,
Recently, when we get Excel output from the reports we created in SAC with the ExportToExcel_1.exportReport() function, if Number Formatting is active, the Measure values ​​in the Excel output are output as a text value such as 1,234.55, and therefore the output is in the General data type, and our users are disturbed by this situation.

If we also turn off Number Formatting, this time the data coming to the model comes as it is. For example, 1,234.5456700.
I think there is such a problem due to the last update, but we could not find a workaround method. If anyone can provide information, I would be glad.

When Number Formatting is active (data type : general but measure with comma)

When Number Formatting is not active (data type: number but measure without formatting)

entry.title: how do you schedule story reports to users ?
entry.content:
#story reports #people analytics

I'm working on scheduling a story report for the user. They receive the link, but when they click on it, the report center opens without any visible download option. Should I be using the legacy distribute tool to schedule the story report instead?

 

Thanks

Archie

entry.title: SAC table add/remove dimension members via Script
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The user wants that in a table some columns (account members) show hidden and if the user wants with a button this members shows

He wants the Excel Group/Ungroup functionality. (see picture)

Accounts are not in hierarchy and Account D is a calculation 

So the user wants to be able to view Account A,B,C and D or only D 

If you could give some example of script to achieve this I will be very grateful

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAC Currency Conversion - Input Control
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am creating a data model and story in SAC where I am once again seeing some problems.

I have created a model with two measures Amount in LC & Amount in GC with three version Actual, Budget & Forecast.

Now I have created a story with a lot of different calculated measures to show in a few graphs (Actuals vs Forecast CY, Actuals vs Budget, ...). Right now these calculated measures / restricted measures are created on top of the Amount in LC.

I am struggling to do the currency conversion as I am not familiar with the best practice.

Initially I thought that I will create a measure input control which allows to toggle between Amount in LC and Amount in GC. This should have been used to create calculated measures on top of this new measure input control. But when creating this new measure input control I saw the following error

Do you know how I can avoid this? Is there any better way for doing the currency conversion accross multiple calculated measures in the story?

Best and thanks
